resources.string: Error occurred while signing in, try again!
Let us know what you think
No email app found on this device
Tap the floating + button on the Notes screen.\nEnter a title and start typing in the content field.\nPress the back arrow — your note saves automatically.

Open or create a note.
Tap the checkbox icon in the bottom action bar.
Enable the checklist toggle.
Type each item on its own line and tap the box to check it off.

Select the text in the content space.
Click on the Text formatting icon in the bottom action bar. 
The text formatting toolbar appears at the bottom.
Tap Bold, Italic, Underline, or Bullet list to apply.

Open or create a note.
Tap the attach (paperclip) icon in the bottom action bar.
Choose Camera, Gallery, Audio, or Video.
The media appears inline in the note.
Set a reminder on a note

Open or create a note.
Tap the bell (reminder) icon in the bottom action bar.
Pick a date and time.
The alarm is scheduled and a reminder badge appears on the note.

Open the note you want to share.
Tap the three-dot More menu.
Tap Share.
Choose the app to share via (email, messaging, etc.).

Sign in with Google and enable CloudSync in Settings.
Open the note and tap the three-dot More menu.
Tap Collaborate.
Enter the collaborator's email and send the invite. You can remove collaborators or leave a shared note from the same dialog.

Enable the AI Assistant in Settings (requires a model download).
Open a note and tap the magic-wand button.
Type a request, or tap the microphone to speak.
The assistant can summarize, auto-tag, schedule reminders, and more.
Open a note and tap the three-dot More menu.\nTap Add label and pick an existing tag or create a new one.\nUse the side drawer to browse notes filtered by tag.

Open the note.
Tap the three-dot More menu.
Tap Export as PDF.
Choose where to share or save the generated file.
Pin a note as a home-screen widget

Open the note.
Tap the three-dot More menu and tap Pin as widget.
Confirm placement on the home screen.
The note appears as a Single Note widget.
Back up and restore via Google Drive
Open Settings and sign in with Google.\nTurn on Automatic backup and pick a frequency.\nUse Backup Now for an immediate backup, or Restore Now to recover a previous one.
Sign in with Google from Settings or the drawer.\nTurn on CloudSync in Settings.\nYour notes sync in real time across your signed-in devices (media isn\'t synced).
Remove your notes from CloudSync and all backups from Google Drive. Notes saved locally on this device are kept.

This permanently removes your notes, tags, and backups from CloudSync (Supabase) and Google Drive. Notes shared with you by other users, and notes saved locally on this device, are not affected. This cannot be undone.
